tables: UP Co-Operative Institutional Service Board UPCISB Combined CoOperative Banking and Technical Services Various Post Recruitment 2026 Exam Date

U.P. Co-Operative Institutional Service Board (UPCISB) has released the Combined Co-Operative Banking & Technical Services Examination (Special) 2026 Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 25/03/2026 to 15/04/2026.candidates should read the UPCISB 2026 Notification for all the information related to the UPCISB exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply.

U.P. Co-Operative Institutional Service Board (UPCISB) UP Combined Co-Operative Banking & Technical Services Examination (Special) 2026 UPCISB Advt No. : A-1/S.R./2026 Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result : WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM
Important Dates Application Begin : 25/03/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 15/04/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 15/04/2026 Exam Date : 20-22 July 2026 Admit Card Available : Before Exam
Application Fee OBC : 500 SC: 250/- PH : 0/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking /UPI Only.

UP Cooperative Bank Ltd Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2026 Minimum Age : 21 Years Maximum Age : 40 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per U.P. Co-Operative Institutional Service Board Combined Banking & Technical Services Examination Special Recruitment Rules .
UPCISB Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 116 Post

Bachelor Degree in Commerce with 55% Marks. OR Bachelor Degree with One Subject in Economics / Mathematics / Statistics with 55% Marks. O Level Exam Passed OR B.Tech / BE Computer Science / IT / BCA / MCA with 55% Marks OR BBA / MBA in Banking / Finance HR OR PGDM Course More Eligibility Read the Notification

How to Fill UPCISB Various Post Online Form 2026 U.P. Co-Operative Institutional Service Board UPCISB Combined Co-Operative Banking & Technical Services Exam Special Recruitment 2026 Are Issued Various Post Recruitment Notification and Invited Online Application Form for the UP Cooperative Bank Recruitment 2026 Candidate Can Apply Online for 25/03/2026 to 15/04/2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the UP Cooperative Bank Career Various Post Recruitment 2026 Application Form in Sarkari Result Recruitment Latest Job Section. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID, Thumb, Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online.
Download Mobile Apps for the Latest Updates
